name: Lemon Cranberry Relish
recipeInstructions:
Makes 1 quart.
Peel oranges with a paring knife, cutting right down to the flesh and removing all the white pith. Cut oranges into chunks and remove seeds. Grate 1 tablespoon of the colored zest from the lemons. Combine oranges, zest, cranberries and sugar in a food processor or blender. Whirl until coarsely chopped.
